scope: PR-020 authenticated saved report history API
reports table migration and Prisma relations
apps/api/src/reports controller, service, repository, report id validation, and HTTP test
deterministic collector signals for backend integration coverage, auth visibility, DTO validation, OpenAPI/versioning, smoke false positive, and duplicated route literals
residualRisk: Approved with residual risk: reviewer found no blocking findings. event-worker-without-backoff-or-concurrency-limit points at a smoke fetch, not a worker. duplicated portfolioId does not introduce contract drift in this cut. Auth is explicit through requireAuthenticatedUser, user isolation is enforced by userId plus portfolioId queries and a composite FK, reportId has manual UUID validation, saved JSON is validated before return, and real HTTP tests plus smoke exercise the production route path. Residual risk: saved report listing has a fixed internal limit of 100 and no cursor/filter contract yet; formal OpenAPI/versioning is still absent and should be addressed before richer UI or external consumers depend on the API.
